reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/6119222168702984294/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xkSFdHcDJjV0UzZFVvd01scExUVUl5V0VSVWFGRRAB

reviews.comment:
I’ve ordered the Akuri Toast from your place earlier, and it always comes with two breads and a side salad. This time, I ordered it as a takeaway. When I reached home and opened the box, I was surprised to see that there was only one bread, no side salad, and the Akuri was just placed on top in a round box.

I understand that sometimes there can be packaging constraints, but that doesn’t justify giving me an incomplete order. Even for takeaway, the full order should be packed the same way it is served. At the very least, I should have been informed that you were unable to pack the full order.

Right now, half of what I paid for is missing. This is not acceptable, and I would like a refund for this order.
